title: fix: allow browser extension URLs in App Key appUrl
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Keys to the browser
gist.blurb: Building a browser extension? You can now use chrome-extension:// and moz-extension:// URLs when creating scoped App Keys. Time to build that AI-powered sidebar!
gist.summary: Updated the App Key validation logic to accept browser extension URL schemes.
gist.impact: Developers can now successfully create scoped App Keys specifically for Chrome and Firefox extensions.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a glowing API key, interacting with a retro browser window or a puzzle piece (universal symbol for browser extensions).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute bee mascot holding a glowing golden key, flying next to a chunky retro computer monitor displaying a web browser with a puzzle piece extension icon. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
